data.content: Ah, the classic "fix" commit extravaganza—24 out of 48 commits, like a soap opera where every episode needs a "fix" title. It seems you’ve discovered a golden age of refactoring, but maybe next time, you could aim for some actual *new* features instead of just reskinning the same old cat. And just a friendly suggestion: if your PRs get any smaller, I might mistakingly think they’re just very confused commit messages trying to hide in plain sight.

data.message:
feat: rename Top Repositories to Recent, show 8 from last 3 months

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove 21 mock events from 2026-03 data

Remove 17 fake commits (short 8-char SHAs like d9f3e221, a3f7c912)
and 4 old mock AI roasts (ai_roast-03xx IDs) that were demo data.
Rebuild index.json with correct stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: truncate commit messages to first line in client-side renderer

The SSR CommitNode.astro correctly used firstLine, but the client-side
renderEventCard() displayed the full multi-line message. Now consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: TopRepos uses real per-repo counts, first month loaded dynamically

- Add repoBreakdown field to MonthSummary with actual event counts per repo
- TopRepos component reads repoBreakdown instead of dividing evenly
- index.astro loads the latest month dynamically instead of hardcoding 2026-03

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: backfill 139 weekly AI roasts across all historical data

Generated locally via Claude, covering 2017-11 through 2026-02.
Each roast references specific patterns from that week's activity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add circuit breakers for AI roast API calls

- Stop immediately on 403 (budget/auth exhausted)
- Wait 60s on 429 then resume
- Stop after 3 consecutive unknown failures
- Always delay between requests, not just after success

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use correct GitHub Models endpoint and add rate limit handling

- Base URL: models.github.ai/inference (not models.inference.ai.azure.com)
- Model name: openai/gpt-4o-mini (vendor prefix required)
- Add 5s delay between AI roast requests to stay under 15/min limit
- On 429, wait 60s before continuing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct GitHub Models base URL (no /v1 prefix)

GitHub Models endpoint is https://models.inference.ai.azure.com,
not /v1. The code appends /chat/completions, so /v1 caused 404.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add models:read permission for GitHub Models API access

GITHUB_TOKEN needs the models permission to call the GitHub Models
inference endpoint. Without it AI roast generation fails with 401.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add actions:write permission to fetch-data workflow

GITHUB_TOKEN needs actions:write to trigger deploy.yml via
gh workflow run. Without it the dispatch call returns HTTP 403.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
